concepts.title: Groupoids, fibered categories, descent
concepts.blurb: Stacks encode objects with automorphisms while preserving gluing across covers.

concepts.title: Classifying stacks BG
concepts.blurb: BG packages principal G-bundles functorially and acts as a universal quotient object.

concepts.title: Deligne–Mumford stacks and coarse spaces
concepts.blurb: DM stacks model orbifold-like moduli with étale atlases and coarse moduli maps.
